name: YOUR personal bodyguard?!?!?
description:
idk bro. I made this because I saw someone on Roblox offering to be a body guard and I thought he and my oc would be friends :D

so yeah this is self indulgent :P

(THE AVA ISN'T BASED ON HIM BTW)

I CAN NOT CONTROL WETHER OR NOT THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, THIS IS MY FIRST BOT!!!
